name: coral.query
attributes_json: {"code.file.path":"crates\\coral-app\\src\\query\\manager.rs","code.module.name":"coral_app::query::manager","code.line.number":311,"thread.id":10,"thread.name":"tokio-rt-worker","level":"INFO","target":"coral_app::query::manager","operation":"execute_sql","workspace":"default","sql":"SELECT l.timestamp, l.service, l.vulnerable_package, o.vulnerability_id, g.commit_hash, g.author, g.message AS commit_msg FROM logs.telemetry l JOIN osv.packages o ON o.package_name = 'urllib3' AND o.version = '1.26.15' JOIN github.commits g ON g.changed_files LIKE '%requirements.txt%' WHERE g.author = 'TANISHX1' AND l.vulnerable_package = 'urllib3==1.26.15' AND o.ecosystem = 'PyPI' LIMIT 5","status":"ok","row_count":"5","busy_ns":191125400,"idle_ns":1189938800}
